security.csp: default-src 'self' customprotocol: asset: ipc: http://ipc.localhost; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' asset: data: blob: https:; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost http://localhost:* http://127.0.0.1:* https:; worker-src 'self' blob:; media-src 'self' blob:; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'
